all_candidates.title: Long Range Attacks After A Battle Of Attrition! | Liège Bastogne Liège 2022 Men's Highlights
Attack After Attack On Steep Climbs | Liège-Bastogne-Liège 2022 Women's Highlights

transcript.clean_text: the 130th anniversary edition of the ice bath was the 108th in total plenty of riders looking to take one of the most prestigious races in the whole of professional cycling la doyen the old lady of the classics 257.1 kilometers leaving the city of liege heading out to bastogne and coming back over a series of punishing climbs four and a half thousand meters of climbing in total the likes of la reduct and roshofocon some of the most famous in world cycling a start and finish at the same line took 45 k's for the breakaway to be formed 11 riders were soon whittled down as we hit the final few climbs a maximum gap of six and a half minutes a hungry peloton behind and then a very nasty crash with 60 k's to go conditioning the rest of the race julia allah philippe was one of the big victims so worried his opponents were about him that hormone balder his compatriot decided to go and check on his health before even thinking of getting back on the bike bahrain victorious by this point we're still racing alaphilippe's abandonment meant that even nepal would be the clear leader that in quick step alpha vinyl colors meanwhile thomas valverde and the rest coming back to the peloton the breakaway with 43ks to go had two and a half minutes six riders left at this stage and in the final 45 kilometers bahrain victorious kicked off the attacks through mike landa a few riders following no huge names yet landed the biggest to go on the attack so early a former winner in what pools then tried his luck damiano caruso also had a go bahrain were active 30 k's to go and la route one of the races iconic climbs was the man to go over the top the last survivor of the breakaway riding really well near the top of the climb this moment renko even pool 22 years of age off the wheel of young maori von savanot um with an aggressive explosive attack that nobody else could follow nielsen palace could for a little while but he couldn't stand the heat and behind they'd have to worry about trying to chase the young belgian star even nepal was on debut in liege and soon started to pick off one by one those who were left in the break then he get to bruno amire with 21.5 kilometers to go the gap at this point almost 40 seconds amir managed to sit on for a while as behind they tried to chase coming up to the final climb la rocha foucault it was on that last climb that the elastic snapped in front even a pool still seated as he rode away on the double digit gradients there's a little bit of waiting perhaps too much behind and even bulls gap was not coming down halfway up it he still had well over 30 seconds dylan turns was the man to put in an attack but have nepal's gap although coming down to 18 seconds would be allowed to grow again through his strong riding and through the tactical games played behind alexander vlassov took advantage of a lull in proceedings in the chase he'd attack with eight and a half k's to go even a paul knew he'd done it with three k's remaining he's got well over half a minute firing incident or accident he was riding away to a memorable victory absolute box office stuff from remko have nepal who saved quick step alpha vinyl spring even a pool arriving belgium going bananas even nepal a monuments man at the age of 22. only the second belgian to win the century and the first since she'll bear in 2011 and funnily enough it would be an all belgian podium quinton hederman's getting back on the chase group for a monument podium with walt fernat finishing third delightful a favorite peters and the rest in quickstep who have suffered in this spring even nepal victorious he won by 48 seconds from herrmont and fernart with martinez andy gita making it two kilometers in the top five on his goodbye appearance alejandro valverde could not equal eddie merks with five wins but he still finished seven a belgian one two three with young renko even pool at the top the youngest belgian rider since the 1960s to win la doyen and the youngest belgian monument winner since the late 1980s even nepal will be compared to the very greats he's a lot to achieve in terms of the numbers in the other races before he gets there this though you get the feeling it's the biggest moment his career today
